commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove unused network API dependencies

- Remove -lbnetapi from Makefile
- Update README.md links
- Remove net API docs from memory
- The program doesn't use any network functionality
- Keep -ltracker for BFilePanel

commit.message:
feat(model-3d): integrate splitFaceByPolygon into Rectangle tool

When drawing a rectangle on an existing HEMesh face, the face is now
split in-place rather than creating a separate thin box object. This
enables push-pull to work naturally on the inner rectangle face.
Falls back to thin box creation for ground plane or when split fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(model-3d): add splitFaceByPolygon kernel function

Implements the core polygon-split algorithm that all drawing-on-face
tools (Rectangle, Circle, Arc, Polygon) will use. For each polygon edge,
extends it to an infinite line and splits all tracked faces sequentially,
then identifies the inner face by centroid proximity.

Also fixes a critical bug in splitFaceByLine where the t parameter passed
to splitEdge was not adjusted for shared edges whose stored half-edge
direction is opposite to the face's half-edge direction. This caused
splits on box faces (or any face with shared edges) to create vertices
at the wrong positions (1-t instead of t).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

MAR-60: Quiz card icons to 24×24px

Lock, tick, and chevron icons in QuizCard all set to 24×24px.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Vercel SPA routing for React Router paths

Without this, any direct navigation to /:gameId or /:gameId/game
returns a 404 because Vercel looks for a file that doesn't exist.
The rewrite rule serves index.html for all paths and lets React Router
handle the routing client-side.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  table and regression tiers, add precise circuit breaker definition
  (same test name/error message, not vague "same root cause")

commit.message:
Build weekly planner: garden-aware tasks, real share/download

- Default to week view on page load (was month view)
- Week starts from today + navigation offset, not from Sunday
- Garden integration: loads plants.json + reads localStorage
  ginaHayaGarden_v2 from the planner to get user's planted plants
- generateDayTasks(): personalizes 2-3 tasks per day card based on:
  * Plants the user actually has planted (matched to biodynamic day type)
  * Current season (winter/spring/summer/fall) seasonal suggestions
  * Generic biodynamic type activities as fallback
  * Shows generic seasonal tips if no garden is saved
- Share modal fully wired:
  * WhatsApp: opens wa.me link with formatted Hebrew week summary
  * Instagram: copies text to clipboard with success toast
  * Copy text: clipboard copy for any platform
  * Download PNG: html2canvas (lazy-loaded from CDN) exports week strip
- "הורד תמונה" quick-access button added to page header
- Garden source badge shows plant count or "no garden" notice
- Week cards show personalized plant emojis inline with task text
- Toast feedback for all share/copy/download actions

- Mobile: touchstart spawns 5-particle burst, max 20 active

fix(seo): move JSON-LD out of React to eliminate Google duplicate error

Next.js RSC payload re-serializes component output, causing Google Rich
Results Test to detect duplicate FAQPage. Fix: remove JSON-LD from React
component tree entirely, inject it post-build via inject-schema.py into
the HTML <head>. This ensures exactly 1 copy in the final HTML.

Build flow: npm run build → python3 inject-schema.py → rsync to docs/

commit.message:
Fix blocking handler: run Claude in background so /cancel works

Wrap text and media handlers in async IIFE instead of awaiting
runClaude directly. This prevents Telegraf's sequential update
processing from blocking /cancel and other commands while Claude
is running.

commit.message:
Add Flatten All Live — closes real broker positions + paper positions

New POST /paper/flatten-all-live endpoint:
- Queries all enabled recorders/traders for current user
- Queues CLOSE task on broker_execution_queue for each (same format as FLAT handler)
- Broker worker calls liquidate_position() (atomic close + cancel all resting orders)
- Also flattens paper positions via existing pipeline
- Works for all brokers (Tradovate, ProjectX, Webull)

Updated sidebar modal to warn about real money impact.

Add X network discovery script

Implements a Python CLI tool that, given an X (Twitter) handle, fetches
recent tweets, replies, mentions, retweets, and quote tweets using the
official X API v2 (via tweepy), then ranks the top accounts by interaction
count and displays a formatted table.

Files added:
- discover.py: main script with full interaction analysis pipeline
- requirements.txt: tweepy, python-dotenv, tabulate
- .env.sample: template for X_BEARER_TOKEN
- .gitignore: standard Python ignores
- README.md: setup, configuration, and usage documentation
